chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 416 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 12.09.2024 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Similar was the case on the last date of hearing. This Court issued direct notices to the petitioner vide orders dated 20.04.2023 and 23.05.2023. Even thereafter, the petitioner has not shown his appearance. Today, a statement has been filed on behalf of Survey Superintendent, Sukkur Division @ Khairpur stating that if the petitioner approaches the said office providing requisite information and desired fee, his case will be entertained in accordance with law. As none is appearing on behalf of the petitioner, this petition is disposed of with directions to the respondents to act in accordance with law, if the petitioner approaches them. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
